key_finding: V≥K decodability INDEPENDENTLY VALIDATED by Zhang et al. (2026). WRRA probing validated by Sun et al. (EMNLP 2025, >90% accuracy). KV-as-computation accepted at ICLR 2026. QK-OV weakly coupled (Anthropic). Steganographic CoT at NeurIPS 2025. All probing papers use residual stream — our K/V decomposition is unique.
evidence_impact: Phase 2 experimental design strongly validated by literature. V≥K decodability explained theoretically (V=content, K=routing). Experiment C (WRRA) has direct precedent.
next_planned: Experiment C (WRRA): probe KV cache at arithmetic error positions. Expect V-probe > K-probe for correct value. Also: statistical significance testing for exp 068-069 probe differences.

null_space_existence.status: CONFIRMED in K-space (p=0.013). Narrow but real. Qwen-specific.

spatial_structure.status: DECISIVELY DISCONFIRMED for selectivity. HEAD-LEVEL CONCENTRATION decisive on Qwen, weak on Llama.

positional_dissociation.status: Complete. Head x position interaction is encoding-dependent.

geometric_dissociation.status: K > V UNIVERSAL: 8 angles. K spectral geometry uniform across heads. V spectral differentiates.

head_level_analysis.status: COMPLETE + SPECTRAL: Two-regime on Qwen (decisive), near-collapse on Llama.

natural_usage.status: CROSS-MODEL (2 families) + LITERATURE VALIDATED: KV > text on Qwen + Mistral. V≥K decodability independently confirmed (Zhang 2026). Next: WRRA (Exp C).

cross_model_replication.status: COMPLETE for Phase 1 (4 families). Phase 2: 2 families (Qwen, Mistral).
